content.en:
Soon, the last one completely completed the three bone changes.

This also means that Ye Tian's immeasurable bones all over his body have completed three bone changes.

At this time, his physical body began to transform, and he was advancing to become a Heavenly Ancestor of the Third Bone Transformation Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body continued to transform, his breath became more and more powerful, and endless energy poured into his body to help him complete the transformation.

After a long time, Ye Tian's breakthrough was completed.

"Finally became a three-time bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With his current strength, he can beat the five Bone Transformation Realms, but it is still inferior to the ordinary Sixth Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, that is, it is not as good as the Lord of the Cave Void and the Lord of the Chaos Ruins.

However, he didn't care about the bone transformation realm under the level of the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void.

His current strength is much stronger than the Void Lord before he broke through.

Of course.

Ye Tian is not qualified to be arrogant now, at least he can't beat the Lord of the Ruins now.

After breaking through to the Third Bone Transformation Realm, he spent a little time stabilizing the realm, and then continued to cultivate.

"The Ancient Hunyuan Liquid still has some effects, but the effect is much worse, and more Taigu Hunyuan Liquid is needed to make four bone changes for an immeasurable bone. Ye Tian muttered.

However, he had found a lot of resources in the Ancient Demon Abyss, and with the Taigu Hunyuan Liquid and some other resources, he should still be able to improve his cultivation to the fourth bone transformation realm, which was not a big problem.

But if he breaks through to the fourth bone transformation realm in the future, his current resources will be of little use, and it won't help much.

Time flies.

An Archievous Era!

Two primeval eras!

Ten primeval eras!

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already cultivated for dozens of primeval eras.

It was also a very long time for him.

And the Ancient Hunyuan Stone had long been exhausted, and a lot of other resources had also been consumed, plus some resources he usually found, he had finally improved his cultivation to the extreme of the Three Bone Transformation Realm, and he had fallen into a bottleneck state.

Just as he was about to impact the four bone transformation realms, a piece of good news came.

Ye Xingchen had cultivated to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and was about to complete a bone transformation of the last immeasurable bone, thus stepping into a bone transformation realm.

Ye Xingchen is an ancient-level genius, once he breaks through to the Bone Transformation Realm, he will be an Ancient-level genius of the Bone Transformation Realm, and his combat power is comparable to that of an ordinary three-dimensional Bone Transformation Realm.

This will also be the second bone transformation realm of the human race.

In addition, Ye Xingchen is Ye Tian's son, so he attaches great importance to it and personally guards it, so that he can rest assured that he will break through.

It didn't take long.

Ye Xingchen successfully broke through.

Rumble!!!

The vision of becoming a bone transformation realm spread throughout the Wanlong territorial waters.

......

Hayabusa Dragon City.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor and the Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor sensed the direction of the Terran Headquarters and saw the huge phantom, and the aura covered the entire Wanlong Territorial Sea, which was an ancient-level genius with nine Blood Transformation Realms breaking through to the Bone Transformation Realm.

"The Terran has given birth to another being who has surpassed the Nine Blood Transformation Realm?"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

"It should be the son of the Endless Lord who has broken through!"

Hongtong Tianzu said with envy.

Regardless of Ye Xingchen's talent and qualifications, but now that Ye Xingchen has broken through to the Bone Transformation Realm and become an ancient-level genius in the Bone Transformation Realm, this is a demon, and it must be recognized.

That's the benefit of having a backer!

"If I am also the son of the Lord of Endless, then it would be great!" Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor sighed.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor on the side was speechless, how old is the Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor, the Endless Lord is very young, the Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor left the Wanlong Territorial Sea for endless years, and the Endless Lord was born!

That's it, Hongtong Tianzu is embarrassed to say this?

Of course, he also wanted to be Ye Tian's son, but he was embarrassed to say it.

......

"Father, I broke through!"

Ye Xingchen was very excited.

Bone Transformation Realm!

He didn't expect that he still had hope of breaking through to this realm.

Of course, he also knew that it was impossible to reach the bone transformation realm on his own, and now he has this achievement, all of which is due to his father.

Therefore, he admires his father very much.

Compared with his father Ye Tian, he is not even one ten-thousandth!

"Cultivate well, you have only been in the Bone Transformation Realm once now, and your strength is still very weak!" Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

The son broke through, and Ye Tian was also ready to impact the four bone transformation realms to see if he could break through.

Subsequently.

He took out the Ancient Blood River Bead to attack the bottleneck.

Rumble!!!!

Shock after impact.

However, his bottleneck was too strong.

"No, it's useless!"

Ye Tian frowned.

It stands to reason that the Ancient Blood River Bead is useful to him!

Soon, he guessed the reason.

He had developed the best primeval arts, so it was harder for him to break the shackles.

If you are invincible at the same level, you have to bear such a price.

"It would be a waste to continue to use the Ancient Blood River Beads!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had to find another way to break through the shackles and become an existence in the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm.

But.

At the moment, he has not thought of a way.

Abrupt.

"Hey, the Lord of the Ruins wants to do something!" Ye Tiandao.

......

Cave of the Ruins.

On this day, the Lord of the Chaos Ruins convened the Bone Transformation Realm of the Chaos Ruins Cave, and also invited the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Xishan and the True Dragon Cave Heaven to discuss a matter together.

The meeting began.

One of the Bone Transformation Realms asked, "Lord of the Ruins, this meeting only convened us, and the original indigenous Bone Transformation Realm who did not invite the territorial sea boundary rift, do you have to do something to them?"

"Of course not!" the Lord of the Ruins shook his head, "we don't have to deal with them, this time it's a different matter, and we need your help." If it succeeds, I will give some resources to everyone. "

"What's the matter!"

The Lord of the Desolation asked curiously.

The Lord of the Ruins did not hide it either, and directly revealed: "In the last dozens of primeval eras, there have been many opportunities for the boundary of the territorial waters, and I have also obtained a lot of resources, and now I have completed six bone transformations of the three hundred and sixty-four immeasurable bones, and only the last immeasurable bone is left, and the bone transformation can almost be completed." "

"Congratulations to the Lord of the Ruins!"

"Congratulations to the Lord of the Ruins!"

"Congratulations to the Lord of the Ruins!"

A bone transformation congratulated.

At the same time, they were also frightened After all, they didn't expect the Lord of the Ruins to grow so fast, and they could break through to the sixth bone transformation realm with only one point left!

Once they break through to the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm, the strength of the Lord of the Ruins far surpasses them, and they can kill a group of them in seconds with their hands!

Of course.

The Lord of the Ruins was on their side, so they had no fear.

Soon, the Lord of the Ruins revealed his plan for this time.
